3125550.name: 学校の怪談　～あなたの後ろに誰かいる～
3125550.description:
2024/08/21 8:30 JPT update

Added a normal mode where the human body model doesn't move too fast.
Added mouse sensitivity settings.
Added the ability to restart from the middle of a reading.
Stopped the passage of time when reading in the library.

-------------------------------------

"Trapped in a School at Midnight"
You find yourself locked in a school at midnight.
Inescapable terror, seven vengeful spirits closing in.
Will you fulfill their wishes, or...?
Features:

360-degree horror!
Innovative 3D action that forces you to turn around
The most terrifying moment? When you turn and something is "there"
7 ghosts lurking throughout the school - Can you escape without confronting them all?
Each spirit has a tragic past - Choose to help them pass on or banish them
Your choices shape the outcome - Multiple ending system
Survival horror where salt is your lifeline

Terrifying encounters:

An old man who wants to tie up students
Someone standing on the rooftop
Anatomical models, pianos, and someone always behind you

A chilling survival horror game where escape from the midnight school is at stake.
Your choices determine your fate and the destinies of seven souls...
Experience absolute terror that will make you scream - right now, in your hands.

Feel free to stream or make Let's Play videos!
Links would be appreciated!
